pokemon:tympole.name: Tympole
pokemon:tympole.summary: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.
They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.
By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans and warns others of danger.
By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans and warns others of danger.
It uses sound waves to communicate with others of its kind. People and other Pokémon species can’t hear its cries of warning.
Graceful ripples running across the water’s surface are a sure sign that Tympole are singing in high-pitched voices below.
By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.
By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans and warns others of danger.
By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans and warns others of danger.
By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.

pokemon:palpitoad.name: Palpitoad
pokemon:palpitoad.summary: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.
When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.
It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.
When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.
On occasion, their cries are sublimely pleasing to the ear. Palpitoad with larger lumps on their bodies can sing with a wider range of sounds.
It weakens its prey with sound waves intense enough to cause headaches, then entangles them with its sticky tongue.
It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to capture prey.
It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.
When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.
It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to immobilize its opponents.

pokemon:seismitoad.name: Seismitoad
pokemon:seismitoad.summary: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.
They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.
By putting power into its bumps, it creates vibrations and increases the power of its punches.
It increases the power of its punches by vibrating the bumps on its fists. It can turn a boulder to rubble with one punch.
This Pokémon is popular among the elderly, who say the vibrations of its lumps are great for massages.
The vibrating of the bumps all over its body causes earthquake-like tremors. Seismitoad and Croagunk are similar species.
It increases the power of its punches by vibrating the bumps on its fists. It can turn a boulder to rubble with one punch.
By putting power into its bumps, it creates vibrations and increases the power of its punches.
It increases the power of its punches by vibrating the bumps on its fists. It can turn a boulder to rubble with one punch.
They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.
